title: B2C2 selects Solana as primary network for stablecoin settlement
message_html: B2C2 selects Solana as primary network for stablecoin settlement ...
snippet: B2C2, a global leader in institutional digital asset liquidity, today announced a collaboration with the Solana Foundation to support institutional stablecoin activity on the Solana network.

title: CaixaBank rolls out crypto investment services
snippet: CaixaBank is to roll out two bitcoin-based crypto-asset investment vehicles in the coming months, offering custody, reception and execution of buy and sell orders.
